name: codemap
description: A living knowledge graph of your codebase. Agents read it as memory over MCP, humans watch it as live telemetry, and both use it as a prompting surface.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @codemap/shared && npm run build -w @codemap/indexer && npm run build -w @codemap/mcp && npm run build -w @codemap/server && npm run build -w @codemap/web
